title: Colossal Flower
description:
There is a [green]colossal flower[/green] growing atop a [red][jitter]mountain of bones[/jitter][/red].

As its [sine][rainbow freq=0.3 sat=0.8 val=1]color-shifting petals[/rainbow][/sine] pulsate, you sense there is a [aqua]Powerful Cluster of Pollen[/aqua] in the center but the undulating petals are [red]razor sharp[/red] and unpredictable.

You could grab some of the [gold]golden nectar[/gold], but reaching the prize in the center is so tempting...
conditions: All players must have at least 19 HP
notes:
[gold]Multi-stage branching event:[/gold] A dangerous exploration where each choice risks more HP for greater rewards.

[gold]Stage 1[/gold]: Choose to safely extract 35 gold or push deeper (lose 5 HP).

[gold]Stage 2[/gold]: The petals are coated with a [purple]substance[/purple] that numbs your pain. Extract 75 gold or continue deeper (lose 6 HP).

[gold]Stage 3[/gold]: The numbing turns into [red]throbbing weakness[/red]. Final choice: extract 135 gold or enter the center (lose 7 HP, obtain [gold]Pollinous Core[/gold]).

Reaching the center with the [gold]Pollinous Core[/gold] grants a unique relic. The plant shudders, its petals go dull, and the golden nectar becomes worthless muck—you killed it.
